base_url.description: Microsoft Graph REST API base URL override for tests or proxies. Defaults to https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0.

client_id.description: Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) application (client) ID used for the OAuth2 client-credentials grant.

tenant_id.description: Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID (GUID or verified domain), used to derive the per-tenant token endpoint. Marked secret to match legacy, which reads it from Secrets.

client_secret.description: Microsoft Entra ID application client secret, sent only in the OAuth2 client-credentials token-exchange request; never logged.

login_base_url.description: Microsoft Entra ID login base URL override for tests or proxies; combined with tenant_id to form the OAuth2 token endpoint (https://login.microsoftonline.com/<tenant_id>/oauth2/v2.0/token, matching legacy's graphTokenURL derivation).

token_url.description: Full OAuth2 token endpoint override. When set, takes priority over the derived login_base_url/tenant_id endpoint (dual-candidate auth pattern; see docs.md Known limits and the sharepoint-lists-enterprise golden).

scope.description: OAuth2 client-credentials scope. Defaults to the static Graph application-permission scope.

period.description: Teams device usage report aggregation period: D7, D30, D90, or D180.

max_pages.description: Optional hard cap on the number of @odata.nextLink pages read per stream, consumed by hooks/microsoft-teams/hooks.go's StreamHook -- NOT a declarative streams.json field (pagination is entirely hook-driven since next_url_path cannot address the literal "@odata.nextLink" key; see docs.md Known limits). Permissive parse: empty, "all", "unlimited", or any non-positive-integer string means unbounded.
